mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS todaysentcount, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Delivery' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todaydeliveredcount, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Bounce' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todaybouncecount, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Complaint' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todaycomplaintcount FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE DATE(stm_fir_reg_dt) = CURDATE() AND send_sts_cd NOT IN ('SR', 'Queued')

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'RUNNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS runningbatchcount, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingbatchcount FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH WHERE START_DATE_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT HOUR(stm_fir_reg_dt) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS sentcount FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE DATE(stm_fir_reg_dt) = #{targetDate} AND send_sts_cd NOT IN ('SR', 'Queued') GROUP BY HOUR(stm_fir_reg_dt) ORDER BY hour
SELECT send_sts_cd AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE stm_fir_reg_dt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY send_sts_cd ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT d.EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ AS id, d.RCV_EMAIL_ADDR AS email, d.SEND_EMAIL_ADDR AS fromemail, d.EMAIL_TITLE AS subject, d.SEND_STS_CD AS status, d.STM_FIR_REG_DT AS regdtm, m.TENANT_ID AS tenantid FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL d LEFT JOIN ADM_EMAIL_SEND_MST m ON d.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ = m.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ WHERE d.SEND_RSLT_TYP_CD IN ('Bounce', 'Complaint') ORDER BY d.STM_FIR_REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE SEND_RSLT_TYP_CD IN ('Bounce', 'Complaint')

SELECT BATCH_ID AS batchid, TEMPLATE_NAME AS templatename, FROM_ADDR AS fromaddr, JOB_NAME AS jobname, STATUS AS status, TOTAL_COUNT AS totalcount, START_DATE_AT AS startdateat FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH ORDER BY START_DATE_AT DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT BATCH_ID AS batchid, TEMPLATE_NAME AS templatename, FROM_ADDR AS fromaddr, JOB_NAME AS jobname, STATUS AS status, TOTAL_COUNT AS totalcount, START_DATE_AT AS startdateat FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH ORDER BY START_DATE_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT BATCH_ID AS batchid, TEMPLATE_NAME AS templatename, STATUS AS status, TOTAL_COUNT AS totalcount, START_DATE_AT AS startdateat FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH WHERE BATCH_ID < #{batchId} ORDER BY START_DATE_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalsent, SUM(CASE WHEN d.SEND_RSLT_TYP_CD = 'Delivery' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivered FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH_ITEM bi JOIN ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL d ON bi.EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ = d.EMAIL_SEND_DTL_SEQ WHERE bi.BATCH_ID = #{batchId}

SELECT el.EVENT_TYPE AS eventtype, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_BATCH_ITEM bi JOIN ADM_EMAIL_EVENT_LOG el ON bi.CORRELATION_ID = el.CORRELATION_ID WHERE bi.BATCH_ID = #{batchId} GROUP BY el.EVENT_TYPE

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(period_start, '%Y-W%v') AS periodlabel, period_start AS periodstart, DATE_ADD(period_start, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AS periodend, SUM(sent_count) AS sentcount, SUM(delivered_count) AS deliveredcount, SUM(bounce_count) AS bouncecount, SUM(complaint_count) AS complaintcount, SUM(open_count) AS opencount, SUM(click_count) AS clickcount FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE(stm_fir_reg_dt), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(stm_fir_reg_dt) DAY) AS period_start, COUNT(*) AS sent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Delivery' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivered_count, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Bounce' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bounce_count, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Complaint' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complaint_count, 0 AS open_count, 0 AS click_count FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE send_sts_cd NOT IN ('SR', 'Queued') GROUP BY period_start ) t GROUP BY period_start ORDER BY period_start DESC LIMIT #{count}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(period_start, '%Y-%m') AS periodlabel, period_start AS periodstart, LAST_DAY(period_start) AS periodend, SUM(sent_count) AS sentcount, SUM(delivered_count) AS deliveredcount, SUM(bounce_count) AS bouncecount, SUM(complaint_count) AS complaintcount, SUM(open_count) AS opencount, SUM(click_count) AS clickcount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stm_fir_reg_dt, '%Y-%m-01') AS period_start, COUNT(*) AS sent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Delivery' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivered_count, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Bounce' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bounce_count, SUM(CASE WHEN send_rslt_typ_cd = 'Complaint' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complaint_count, 0 AS open_count, 0 AS click_count FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE send_sts_cd NOT IN ('SR', 'Queued') GROUP BY period_start ) t GROUP BY period_start ORDER BY period_start DESC LIMIT #{count}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stm_fir_reg_dt, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS sentcount FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE send_sts_cd NOT IN ('SR', 'Queued') AND stm_fir_reg_dt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(stm_fir_reg_dt, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stm_fir_reg_dt, '%Y-%m') AS month, send_rslt_typ_cd AS eventtype, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL WHERE send_rslt_typ_cd IS NOT NULL AND stm_fir_reg_dt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(stm_fir_reg_dt, '%Y-%m'), send_rslt_typ_cd ORDER BY month DESC

SELECT m.TENANT_ID AS tenantid, COUNT(*) AS totalsent, SUM(CASE WHEN d.SEND_RSLT_TYP_CD = 'Delivery' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivered, SUM(CASE WHEN d.SEND_RSLT_TYP_CD = 'Bounce' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bounced, SUM(CASE WHEN d.SEND_RSLT_TYP_CD = 'Complaint' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complained FROM ADM_EMAIL_SEND_DTL d JOIN ADM_EMAIL_SEND_MST m ON d.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ = m.EMAIL_SEND_SEQ WHERE DATE(d.STM_FIR_REG_DT) = CURDATE() AND d.SEND_STS_CD NOT IN ('SR', 'Queued') GROUP BY m.TENANT_ID
